use_for: lock files, shared/exclusive lock guards, lock metadata
avoid_custom_when: you need lock acquisition/release and stale lock detection
you are writing sleep/retry loops manually
you are adding ad-hoc println/eprintln diagnostics
you are hand-padding columns in terminal output

use_for: process liveness, pid metadata, host/system info
avoid_custom_when: you are shelling out repeatedly for basic process checks
